zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Maurice Russell於1356年2月2日出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾其皮三 索德波利時，他的父親Sir Ralph Russell41歲，母親Mrs. Alesia, Alice Russell21歲。他於大約1379年6月與Isabel Childrey在英國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1416年6月27日在英國格盧斯特斯爾代哈姆享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾代哈姆聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Russell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: of Norman origin, from Old French and Anglo-Norman French r(o)ussel, a diminutive of Old French rous(e) ‘red, reddish’, used either as a nickname for someone with red hair or a ruddy complexion, or as a personal name. Compare Rouse . This Norman name has been established in Ireland since the 12th century. It has been reinforced in Britain and Ireland by Huguenot bearers of the name Roussel, of the same Old French origin.

English: habitational name from any of several places called Rushall (Norfolk, Staffordshire, Wiltshire) or possibly sometimes from Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent). Rushall in Staffordshire derives from Old English rysc ‘rush, rushes’ + halh ‘nook, corner of land’. Rushall in Norfolk derives from an uncertain first element + Old English halh. Rushall in Wiltshire derives from an Old English personal name Rust (genitive Rustes) + halh. Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent) probably derives from Old English rust ‘rust, rust color’ + wella ‘well, spring, stream’, but with a change in the final element due to influence from Middle English, Old English hall ‘hall, residence’, perhaps referring to a nearby building.
Americanized form of German Rüssel, from a pet form of any of various personal names formed with the element hrōd ‘fame, renown’.

variants.name: Russler
meanings: occupational name for a farmer, from an agent derivative of rüsseln ‘to shallow plow’.

variants.name: Rouse
meanings: English: nickname for a person with red hair or a ruddy complexion, from Middle English, Anglo-Norman French rous(e) ‘red(-haired)’ (from Latin russ(e)us).
Walloon and northern French (Rousé): variant of Rosé (see Rose ).

variants.name: Russel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Russell  .
German: from a pet form of Russ, see Russ 2.
northwest German (Rüssel): probably a variant of Rossel .

nameMeanings.name: Maurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Mauricius, a derivative of Maurus (a byname meaning ‘Moor’, i.e. ‘dark, swarthy’), borne by, among others, an early Byzantine emperor ( c.539–602 ). It was introduced to Britain by the Normans and was popular in the Middle English period, but was not widely adopted by the nobility and became rare in the 17th century. Between the mid-19th century and the 1940s, it was moderately popular but has since faded again. See also Morris .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Maurice Russell was born on 2 February 1356, in Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Ralph Russell, was 41 and his mother, Mrs. Alesia, Alice Russell, was 21. He married Isabel Childrey about June 1379, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 27 June 1416, in Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in St Peter's Church, Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Maurice Russell est né le 2 février 1356, à Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ralph Russell, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Alesia, Alice Russell, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Childrey environ juin 1379, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 27 juin 1416, à Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à St Peter's Church, Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Maurice Russellが1356年2月2日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチップイング ソドブリーで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Russellは41歳，母Mrs. Alesia, Alice Russellは21歳であった。約1379年6月にイギリスでIsabel Childreyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1416年6月27日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアディルハムで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアディルハムスト ペテル'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Maurice Russell(이)가 1356년 2월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 치핀그 소드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph Russell(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Alesia, Alice Russell(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1379년 6월 영국에서 Isabel Childrey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1416년 6월 27일 영국 그루스스터실르 디람에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 디람 스트 피터'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Maurice Russell nasceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1356, em Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Ralph Russell, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Alesia, Alice Russell, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Childrey aproximadamente junho de 1379, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 27 de junho de 1416, em Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em St Peter's Church, Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Maurice Russell родился 2 февраля 1356 г. в местности чиппинг содбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph Russell было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Alesia, Alice Russell, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Childrey около июнь 1379 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 27 июня 1416 г. в местности дирам, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности ст питир'с чурч, дирам, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Maurice Russell nació el 2 de febrero de 1356, en Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Ralph Russell, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Mrs. Alesia, Alice Russell, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Isabel Childrey aproximadamente junio de 1379, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 27 de junio de 1416, en Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en St Peter's Church, Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
